Technology.title: Theoretical Framework
Technology.subtitle: NCT reimagines 6 classic consciousness neuroscience theories, achieving mathematical unification and engineering implementation
Technology.theory_gwt_desc: Baars' Global Workspace Theory posits that consciousness results from global broadcasting of information in the brain.
Technology.theory_gwt_impl: NCT implements global workspace using multi-head attention, with 8 attention heads responsible for different functions: visual/auditory saliency detection, emotional value assessment, task relevance judgment, and novelty detection.
Technology.theory_iit_desc: Tononi's IIT theory posits that consciousness is the measure of integrated information in a system, represented by Φ value.
Technology.theory_iit_impl: NCT calculates Φ value from Attention Flow using random bipartition approximation, reducing complexity from O(2^N) to O(n²), with correlation r=0.978 to exact calculation.
Technology.theory_pc_desc: Friston's Free Energy Principle posits that the brain perceives the world by minimizing prediction error.
Technology.theory_pc_impl: NCT proves that Transformer Decoder training objective is equivalent to minimizing variational free energy, unifying predictive coding with deep learning.
Technology.theory_stdp_desc: Spike-Timing-Dependent Plasticity (STDP) is a temporally refined version of Hebbian learning.
Technology.theory_stdp_impl: NCT proposes Transformer-STDP hybrid learning: Δw = (δ_STDP + λ·δ_attention) · η_neuromodulator, combining local temporal correlation with global semantic modulation.
Technology.theory_neuro_desc: Dopamine (DA), Serotonin (5-HT), Norepinephrine (NE), and Acetylcholine (ACh) regulate learning rates.
Technology.theory_neuro_impl: NCT implements exponential gating formula: η = exp(Σ w_k·Δn_k), dynamically regulating synaptic plasticity.
Technology.theory_gamma_desc: 40Hz gamma oscillations are associated with temporal integration of conscious perception.
Technology.theory_gamma_impl: NCT uses simplified PING model for phase locking, serving as periodic signal for consciousness updates.
Technology.architecture_desc: NCT System Architecture: Multi-modal Input → Feature Encoding → Attention Workspace (Multi-candidate Competition) → Hybrid Learning + Predictive Coding + Φ Calculation
Technology.cta_desc: Read the complete technical documentation to understand NCT's engineering implementation

Hero.subtitle: First innovative framework to unify 6 major consciousness theories (GWT, IIT, Predictive Coding) within Transformer architecture

Features.title: Core Features
Features.subtitle: NCT reimagines classic consciousness neuroscience theories, achieving six key technological breakthroughs
Features.gwt_desc: Global information broadcasting and integration via Attention mechanism
Features.iit_desc: Approximate Φ value calculation to quantify consciousness level
Features.predictive_coding_desc: Minimize prediction error through Decoder hierarchy
Features.neuromodulator_desc: Simulate dopamine, 5-HT and other modulators to regulate learning
Features.cross_modal_desc: Multi-modal semantic alignment, NCC improved from 0.6 to 0.82 (+42%)

About.title: About NCT
About.subtitle: NeuroConscious Transformer - Reimagining Neuroscience with Transformer
About.mission_p1: NCT (NeuroConscious Transformer) is a next-generation neuromorphic consciousness architecture, aiming to reimagine classic consciousness neuroscience theories using Transformer technology.
About.mission_p2: Our goal is to build a trainable, verifiable, reproducible innovative framework that unifies 6 core theories (GWT, IIT, Predictive Coding, etc.) within the Transformer architecture.
About.mission_p3: Through engineering implementation, we bring consciousness computing from theory to practice, providing new tools and perspectives for AI research and neuroscience.
About.team_bio: Focusing on the engineering implementation of consciousness computing, dedicated to transforming neuroscience theories into learnable AI architectures. Founder and principal researcher of the NCT project.
About.milestone_v22_desc: Used simple lateral inhibition to implement global workspace, 75% accuracy
About.milestone_v30_desc: Introduced multi-head attention mechanism, unified 6 theories, accuracy improved to 92%
About.milestone_v31_desc: Completed all 6 core experimental validations, Φ value reached 0.329 (d=768)
About.milestone_v31p_desc: neuroconscious.link officially opened, providing complete documentation and technical blog
About.contact_desc: If you are interested in NCT, want to collaborate, or have any questions, please feel free to contact us.
